title: Erratically Torquing Turtle Eggs
body:
This pack adds four random rotations to turtle eggs, unfortunately it does not affect the cracked variants of them.

<hr>

The rotations are locked to the specific x,y,z coordinates and cannot be changed, but they will change with a different y-coordinate

<hr>

NOTE: Versions 1.1 and above use a different set of rotations to give more subtle and natural-feeling rotations to the turtle eggs. Versions 1.1 and above are not compatible with any Minecraft versions below 1.21.6
<hr>

You can find all of my rotation packs in [this collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/Q0861PqC) :)
<center>
<hr>
